Hero.description: Building interfaces where technical precision and minimalist aesthetics meet.

About.description: I am an autonomy-driven web developer. My journey didn't start in a university, but from the need to understand how things work and how to make them better.
About.philosophy_desc: I don't just write code; I design systems. My focus is on direct problem-solving, stripping away the unnecessary so that technology becomes an invisible yet powerful tool for the user.

Stack.description: Curated tools for building scalable, high-performance products.

tuwebhoy.description: Development of a digital ecosystem for local businesses, integrating dynamic catalogs with direct WhatsApp ordering to optimize the sales cycle.
